page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelions: Created World -another cases- Perfect Guide
text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelions -another cases- video game by Kadokawa Game Collection. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 30 June 2006. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4047072206 

Overview

Strategy book for version of Neon Genesis Evangelions. 

The secret of the "world" is finally revealed. This book is a must-have book to enjoy and conquer all of the newly remade "Neon Genesis Evangelions"!

Table of Contents

Staff
